name: Causeway Park
description: Come play pickleball at Causeway Park in Oxford, MD! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Easton Family YMCA at Washington Street
description: Easton Family YMCA at Washington Street is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Easton, MD. There are 4 indoor clay and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Easton Family YMCA - Peachblossom
description: Come play pickleball at Easton Family YMCA - Peachblossom in Easton, MD! There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Perkins Family YMCA
description: Perkins Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Michaels, MD. There are 4 acrylic courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Talbot County Community Center
description: Talbot County Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Easton, MD. There are 14 wood and asphalt courts. 8 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees:
Fee required — Drop in: $5
Court Rental: $20 per hour
